info.title: SWITCH Data Access API
info.description: API endpoints for accessing public data from switch-locations

get.description:
Get city boundaries GeoJSON for a specific city.

Currently supports Bari (bari_41038) from public_data structure.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    source: Data source - 'cloud' (default) or 'local'
    bucket_name: GCS bucket name (only used when source='cloud')

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection with city boundaries

Get any GeoJSON file from public_data structure for a specific city.

The file_path should be relative to the public_data directory.
For example, to access boundaries.geojson:
- file_path: "geospatial_context/boundaries/osm/boundaries.geojson"

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    file_path: Relative path to GeoJSON file within public_data directory
    bucket_name: GCS bucket name

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection

Get a JSON structure of all available data on GCP.

Returns a nested structure showing all cities, categories, and GeoJSON files
available in the public_data structure.

Args:
    bucket_name: GCS bucket name
    city_identifier: Optional city identifier to filter results for a specific city

Returns:
    JSON structure with all available data

Get a JSON structure of all available data for a specific city on GCP.

Returns a nested structure showing all categories and GeoJSON files
available in the public_data structure for the specified city.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    bucket_name: GCS bucket name

Returns:
    JSON structure with all available data for the city

Get historical trip data within a date range as individual trip features.

Returns individual trips as GeoJSON features with LineString geometries
from origin to destination, and timestamp information.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    start_date: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    end_date: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    zoning_system: Zoning system name (default: 'grid_squares_1km')
    mobility_type: Mobility type (default: 'sharing_mobility')
    source: Data source - 'local' (default) or 'cloud'

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection with individual trip features (LineString geometries)

Get historical vehicle locations data within a date range as individual vehicle location features.

Returns individual vehicle locations as GeoJSON features with Point geometries,
timestamp, and vehicle ID information.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    start_date: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    end_date: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    zoning_system: Zoning system name (default: 'grid_squares_1km')
    mobility_type: Mobility type (default: 'sharing_mobility')
    source: Data source - 'local' (default) or 'cloud'

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection with individual vehicle location features (Point geometries)

Get origin-destination analysis grouped by time slots and weekday/weekend.

Groups origins and destinations by time of day (0-6, 6-12, 12-18, 18-24)
and calculates generation (origin) and attraction (destination) scores.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    start_date: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    end_date: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    zoning_system: Zoning system name (default: 'grid_squares_1km')
    mobility_type: Mobility type (default: 'sharing_mobility')
    source: Data source - 'local' (default) or 'cloud'

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection with zones and OD analysis scores

Get forecasted number of origins per zone in the specified interval with the specified granularity.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    start_date: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    end_date: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    time_granularity: Time granularity (e.g., 'hour', 'day', 'week')
    zoning_system: Zoning system name (default: 'grid_squares_1km')
    mobility_type: Mobility type (default: 'sharing_mobility')
    source: Data source - 'local' (default) or 'cloud'

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection with zones and forecasted origins

Get a single charging station snapshot for a specific city as GeoJSON.

Returns the most recent snapshot if timestamp is not provided, or a specific
snapshot if timestamp is provided in format YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.
Each charging station is returned as a Point feature with coordinates.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    source: Data source - 'cloud' (default) or 'local'
    bucket_name: GCS bucket name (only used when source='cloud')
    timestamp: Optional timestamp string in format YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS (e.g., '20251113_175008')

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection with charging stations as Point features

List all available charging station snapshots for a specific city.

Args:
    city_identifier: City identifier (e.g., 'bari_41038')
    source: Data source - 'cloud' (default) or 'local'
    bucket_name: GCS bucket name (only used when source='cloud')

Returns:
    JSON array with snapshot metadata (timestamp, filename, size, etc.)
